message:
feat: comprehensive refresh — 20K+ stars, FrankenSuite section, new sites, Discord, guides

Update all stats: 16.7K→20K+ stars, 90→170+ projects. Add FrankenSuite
section with 17 clean-room Rust reimplementations (SQLite, Redis, NumPy,
SciPy, PyTorch, JAX, pandas, NetworkX, Mermaid, ext4/btrfs, libc, Whisper,
plus FrankenEngine, FrankenNode, FrankenSearch, FrankenTerm, FrankenTUI).

Add 5 new website badges: jeffreys-skills.md (paid SaaS), mcpagentmail.com,
frankensqlite.com, asupersync.com, Flywheel Hub Discord (~800 members).

Expand "What I'm Building Now" with Flywheel Connectors (89 connectors,
~1.4M lines Rust, 58K+ tests), Pi Agent Rust (590 stars), MCP Agent Mail
Rust, Cross Agent Session Resumer.

Update Products section: add jeffreys-skills.md, mcpagentmail.com,
frankensqlite.com, asupersync.com. Add agent-flywheel.com guide links
(/complete-guide and /core-flywheel) and Discord invite.

Expand Flywheel Connectors description with security architecture details
(WASI sandboxing, cryptographic capability tokens, zone-based encryption).

Update recognition: 16,700→20,000+ stars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -55,7 +60,7 @@ ## The Agentic Coding Flywheel -A self-reinforcing ecosystem of 14 tools for multi-agent software development. Agents coordinate via mail, track work via beads, search past sessions, guard against destructive mistakes, and orchestrate across tmux panes. Each tool amplifies the others. The whole thing started in October 2025 and the shipping cadence accelerates with every addition. +A self-reinforcing ecosystem of 14 tools for multi-agent software development. Agents coordinate via mail, track work via beads, search past sessions, guard against destructive mistakes, and orchestrate across tmux panes. Each tool amplifies the others. Started October 2025; shipping cadence accelerates with every addition. Join the [Flywheel Hub Discord](https://discord.gg/gnCHsYDR25) (~800 members). Read the [comprehensive guide](https://agent-flywheel.com/complete-guide) or the [beginner-friendly version](https://agent-flywheel.com/core-flywheel).

@@ -99,13 +104,40 @@ A self-reinforcing ecosystem of 14 tools for multi-agent software development. A --- +## The FrankenSuite + +Clean-room Rust reimplementations of foundational software. Each targets drop-in compatibility with the original while adding memory safety, concurrency, and in some cases entirely new capabilities. + +| Project | Stars | What it reimplements | +|:--------|:-----:|:---------------------| +| [**FrankenSQLite**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | SQLite with MVCC concurrent writers and RaptorQ self-healing. 26-crate workspace. | +| [**FrankenTUI**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | 850K+ lines of Rust, 20 crates, 106 widgets. Kernel-level TUI foundation. | +| [**FrankenTerm**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenterm) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankenterm?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | WezTerm fork extended into a swarm-native terminal platform. 120+ crates, 45K+ tests. | +| [**FrankenSearch**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | Two-tier hybrid search: HNSW ANN + Tantivy full-text + cross-encoder reranking. | +| [**FrankenEngine**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_engine) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/franken_engine?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | Native Rust runtime for adversarial extension workloads. Deterministic replay, cryptographic receipts. | +| [**FrankenNode**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_node) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/franken_node?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | Trust-native JS/TS runtime on FrankenEngine. Migration autopilot, per-extension trust cards. | +| [**FrankenLibC**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenlibc) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankenlibc?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | Rust-based libc with LD_PRELOAD safety membrane. Retrofits memory safety onto any C program. | +| [**FrankenFS**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenfs) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankenfs?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | ext4/btrfs in Rust via FUSE. Block-level MVCC + RaptorQ fountain codes for mathematical self-healing. | +| [**FrankenRedis**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenredis) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankenredis?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | Redis reimplementation targeting full protocol parity. Deterministic Latency Replication Core. | +| [**FrankenPandas**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenpandas) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankenpandas?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | Full pandas API in Rust. Columnar storage, 7 IO formats, 1,500+ tests. | +| [**FrankenJAX**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenjax) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankenjax?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | JAX transform semantics (jit, grad, vmap) with JAXPR-like IR. 110 primitives, full AD, 834 oracle tests. | +| [**FrankenTorch**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentorch) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankentorch?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | PyTorch reimplementation with Deterministic Autograd Contract. | +| [**FrankenNumPy**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_numpy) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/franken_numpy?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | NumPy in Rust. 9 crates, zero unsafe, 2,282 tests, bit-exact RNG parity. | +| [**FrankenSciPy**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenscipy) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankenscipy?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | SciPy with Condition-Aware Solver Portfolio (CASP). | +| [**FrankenMermaid**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenmermaid) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankenmermaid?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | Mermaid diagram engine. 25+ diagram types, deterministic layout, WASM-ready. | +| [**FrankenWhisper**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_whisper) | ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/franken_whisper?style=flat-square&label=⭐) | Whisper speech recognition in Rust. No Python dependency. | +| [**FrankenNetworkX**](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_networkx) |
